original_image_tags: page number "67" in bottom right corner

elements.description: A dark scan of a typed document page. The page contains typed text describing a UAP sighting report at Ft. Knox, detailing observations by Military Police and Lt. Ormer, involving an unknown object and the pursuit by P-51 aircraft. The text includes specific locations like Maysville, Irvington, and Owensboro, Ky., and notes a reliability verification by various officers. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts on this page. The word 'RESTRICTED' appears at the top and bottom of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree there are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts on the page, so there is no visual content to disagree about.
